data.title: Fed Board nominee Milan: Fed independence is crucial to the economy
data.description: Milan, the nominee for the Federal Reserve Board of Governors, said: "The independence of the Federal Reserve is crucial to the economy. The president nominated me because he shares my policy views. If confirmed, I will act independently." (Jinshi)

data.title: Cumberland withdraws 22,086 ETH from Coinbase Prime
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, 33 minutes ago, market maker Cumberland withdrew 22,086 ETH worth US$96.99 million from the Coinbase Prime hot wallet address.

data.title: Ether.fi user registrations increased by nearly 600% in the past 24 hours
data.description: The official ether.fi account, X, stated that user registrations had increased by nearly 600% in the past 24 hours, putting pressure on the system. The system has now been upgraded and is back to normal operation.

data.title: 833K ETH Trapped in Validator Queue Creates Supply Shortage – $4,500 Breakout Next?
data.description:
Ethereum supply shortage intensifies as 833,141 ETH remain trapped in a 14-day validator staking queue while Fundstrat analysts predict $9,000 ETH by January 2026, citing a resurfacing Wyckoff accumulation pattern that previously drove ETH from $90 to $4,866.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/833k-eth-trapped-in-validator-queue-creates-supply-shortage-4500-breakout-next/

data.title: Bitcoin held by public companies passes 1 million BTC amid asset’s rising popularity
data.description:
While the number of Bitcoin treasuries continues to grow, more than 100 public companies currently hold BTC.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/369495/bitcoin-held-by-public-companies-passes-1-million-btc-amid-assets-rising-popularity?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Greeks.live: Traders generally believe that the current market is near a key technical level
data.description: Adam, a macroeconomic researcher at Greeks.live, published a Chinese community newsletter stating, "The community exhibits diverse investment sentiment, focusing on both technical indicator changes in the cryptocurrency market and actively participating in volatility trading opportunities in the A-share market. Traders generally believe that the current market is near key technical levels and are closely monitoring technical signals such as MACD death crosses and declining IV."

data.title: Bitget HodlerYield project USDE income upgrade, spot and contract position limits raised to US$1 million
data.description: Bitget's HodlerYield project has upgraded its USDE yields, allowing users to earn a 9% APR on USDE holdings without having to subscribe. The maximum position limit for both spot and futures contracts has been increased to $1 million. Bitget now supports USDE spot trading, collateralized lending, joint margin, spot leverage, and other scenarios.

data.title: Ethereum Falls Below $4,300 Amid Daily Decline
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum's price has recently dropped below $4,300, currently trading at $4,297.13 per coin. This marks a daily decrease of 4.08%.

data.title: Market Volatility Increases as Crypto Stocks Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Greeks.live macro researcher Adam recently tweeted about the current market downturn. He noted that Bitcoin's short to medium-term implied volatility (IV) has surged to 40%, while Ethereum's short-term IV has risen to 70%. This increase in IV indicates heightened market expectations for volatility this week.

The decline in U.S. crypto-related stocks, particularly those in the MicroStrategy series, has been a catalyst for this downturn. Historically, September has been a month of weaker capital flows, but the final quarter is expected to see more robust funding.

Additionally, there has been a rapid increase in the volume of bearish options trading today, with a total of $1.17 billion in transactions, accounting for 30% of the day's total trading volume. This reflects a defensive sentiment dominating the market.

data.title: Federal Reserve Nominee Milan States No Commitment to Support Rate Cuts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Board nominee Milan has stated that no one has asked him to pledge his vote in favor of interest rate cuts. This announcement comes amid ongoing discussions about the future direction of U.S. monetary policy.

data.title: Data: Ethereum CEX spot trading volume reached approximately $480 billion in August
data.description: In August, monthly spot trading volume for ETH on centralized exchanges reached approximately $480 billion, surpassing Bitcoin (BTC)'s $401 billion. Several companies, such as BitMine Immersion and SharpLink Gaming, disclosed large ETH purchases, driving up their holdings. During the same period, US spot ETH ETFs saw net inflows of $3.95 billion, while BTC ETFs saw net outflows of $301 million. ETH is up over 105% year-to-date, while BTC is up approximately 18%. (The Block)

data.title: Jito Foundation Announces Updates to JTO Token Economics
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the Jito Foundation has announced four significant updates to the JTO token economics. The foundation has completed its first round of JTO buybacks, totaling $1 million, executed in four transactions over ten days. The organization plans to continue using the TWAP buyback strategy and is exploring additional mechanisms, such as an auction system, to facilitate automatic value accumulation for JTO.

Additionally, the JIP-24 proposal has been approved, resulting in a doubling of the DAO block engine fees. The foundation has also launched the JTO Economic Hub page and held its first conference call for JTO holders.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Faces Charges Over National Guard Deployment
data.description: According to Foresight News, U.S. President Donald Trump has been indicted for deploying National Guard troops in Washington, D.C. The charges stem from actions taken during his presidency, raising legal questions about the use of military forces in domestic affairs. This development adds to the ongoing legal challenges faced by Trump, who has been involved in various controversies during his time in office. The case highlights the complexities of presidential authority and its implications for national security and civil liberties.

data.title: Over $45 million in liquidation occurred across the network in the past hour, primarily due to long positions.
data.description: Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network had a liquidation of US$45.0047 million, of which long positions had a liquidation of US$42.5519 million and short positions had a liquidation of US$2.4528 million.

data.title: Building Blocks: Token claims will be open at TGE, and BARD public sale settlement and refunds have been initiated
data.description: Buildingpad announced on the X platform that the settlement and refund process for the public sale of BARD, the Bitcoin DeFi protocol Lombard's token, has officially begun. To ensure the security of all user funds, withdrawals will be available in phases. Token claims will be available at Lombard's TGE.

data.title: Binance Alpha to List OpenLedger (OPEN) on September 8th
data.description: Binance Alpha will list OpenLedger (OPEN) on September 8th. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Alpha Points after trading opens. More details will be announced soon.

data.title: Strategy's Potential Inclusion in S&P 500 Sparks Interest
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Strategy is being considered as a potential addition to the S&P 500 index. Bloomberg reports that the company's unrealized gains of $14 billion last quarter theoretically meet the profitability criteria required for inclusion.

Stephens Inc. analysts suggest that if Strategy is approved, passive funds tracking the index would need to purchase nearly 50 million shares, valued at approximately $16 billion at current prices.

Beyond profitability, the S&P committee will evaluate factors such as liquidity, profitability, and trading history, while also considering industry balance. To be included, companies must be highly liquid U.S. firms with a market capitalization of at least $22.7 billion and must have reported positive earnings in the most recent quarter and over the past four quarters.

data.title: Musk's X Money plan is hampered by regulators and employee turnover
data.description: Elon Musk's X Money initiative has been hampered by regulatory obstacles and employee turnover. One of Musk's biggest ambitions is to disrupt and replace traditional banks and payment processors with technology. Meanwhile, one of his management philosophies is to push employees to develop products as quickly and cost-effectively as possible. Within X, these two ideals are clashing. Musk's desire to quickly launch a nationwide payments service has led to regulatory hurdles, sparking a wave of senior employee departures.

data.title: Circle: Native USDC and CCTP V2 Coming Soon to Plume
data.description: According to official news, Circle announced that native USDC and CCTP V 2 will soon be listed on Plume.
